title: MatchSummary
description: Canonical live/result/header summary for a single football match.

matchId.description: Stable match identifier in the source dataset when known.

kickoff.description: Kickoff time as an ISO-8601 timestamp when known.

status.description: Canonical match status for header and live/result UI.

statusLabel.description: Provider or display-ready status label when useful (for example FT, AET, AP, 1st half, or Postponed).

resolvedIn.description: How a finished match was resolved when the source exposes it. Null when unknown or not applicable.

shootoutWinner.description: Winner of a penalty shootout when resolvedIn is 'shootout'. Null otherwise.

minute.description: Current live match minute when the source exposes it cleanly. Currently no adapter populates this; reserved for future live feeds.

attendance.description: Attendance when the source exposes it.

sourceMeta.description: Provider-scoped metadata bag for provenance and advanced debugging. It must stay JSON-serializable, must not duplicate canonical top-level fields, and must not reinterpret raw provider semantics into fake cross-provider meaning.
